title: pseudoroegneria marginata
intro: Pseudoroegneria marginata, also known as Ezo spruce or Japanese red rice grass, is a type of grass species native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pseudoroegneria marginata include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal purposes, and is also used as a food ingredient in some Japanese cuisine.
